member_group_control.nulltext: ต้องระบุค่าเสมอ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control) as group_control_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.coop_position, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card
, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_address , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_road , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_tambol , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_province_code , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_district_code , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_postcode ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_mobile_phone ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_province_code ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_district_code) as district_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_province_code) as province_name
FROM sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b WHERE sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.represent_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control between '!member_group_control_1!' and '!member_group_control_2!' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '022498' order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
